name: Sugar Cookie Jewels
recipeIngredient: 12 oz. pkg M&M's Baking Bits (either flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy; add egg and vanilla.
3. Combine flour and baking soda; add to creamed mixture just until blended.
4. Stir in M&M's Chocolate Baking Bits.
5. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Place on greased cookie sheets about 2-inches apart.
7. Flatten each ball slightly with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar, being careful not to crush the baking bits.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until edges are light golden.
9. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before transferring them to wire racks to cool completely.
10. Store in tightly covered containers.
